name: check_integrity
short_description: Check the integrity of a design checkpoint
full_help:
check_integrity

Description: 
Check the integrity of a design checkpoint

Syntax: 
check_integrity  [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Design checkpoint file

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
